requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to ETSI / JS Standards (TRC Type Approval Requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: ETSI/JS标准的EMC测试（TRC型号认证要求）
requirement_topic.zht: ETSI/JS標準的EMC測試（TRC型號認證要求）

summary.en: TRC type approval requires EMC test reports from an accredited laboratory demonstrating conformance with ETSI or equivalent standards applicable to the device category. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ETSI EN 301 489-1 (common EMC requirements for radio equipment) and ETSI EN 301 489-17 (specific for wideband data/WLAN/Bluetooth) are the primary referenced standards. For other radio categories (LoRa/SRD, cellular), the corresponding ETSI EN 301 489 sub-part applies. JISM (Jordan Institution for Standards and Metrology) publishes Jordan Standards (JS) that frequently adopt IEC, ETSI, or ISO standards — JS equivalents to IEC 61000 series immunity standards may also be referenced. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the TRC type approval application dossier. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not accepted by TRC.
summary.zh: TRC型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的ETSI或等效标准。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，主要参考标准为ETSI EN 301 489-1（无线电设备通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（宽带数据/WLAN/蓝牙专项）。其他无线类别（LoRa/SRD、蜂窝）则适用相应的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。JISM（约旦标准与计量机构）发布约旦标准（JS），通常采用IEC、ETSI或ISO标准 — IEC 61000系列抗扰度标准的JS等效版本也可能被参考。EMC测试证据作为TRC型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被TRC接受。
summary.zht: TRC型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的ETSI或等效標準。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，主要參考標準為ETSI EN 301 489-1（無線電設備通用EMC要求）和ETSI EN 301 489-17（寬頻資料/WLAN/藍牙專項）。其他無線類別（LoRa/SRD、蜂窩）則適用相應的ETSI EN 301 489子部分。JISM（約旦標準與計量機構）發布約旦標準（JS），通常採用IEC、ETSI或ISO標準 — IEC 61000系列抗擾度標準的JS等效版本也可能被參考。EMC測試證據作為TRC型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被TRC接受。

standards_or_laws: ETSI EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (EMC for wideband data and HIPERLAN)
JISM Jordan Standards (JS) — IEC/ETSI adoptions for EMC

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification includes EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: TRC requires EMC evidence to ETSI EN 301 489 series standards, which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at a TRC-accepted accredited laboratory is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused for TRC. The ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) which is not part of the SRRC scope. JISM JS standards may additionally reference IEC 61000 immunity requirements independently of TRC; exporters should confirm applicable JS standards for their specific product category with JISM before shipment.
gap.zh: TRC要求提供符合ETSI EN 301 489系列标准的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在TRC认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能用于TRC。ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列），该部分不在SRRC范围之内。JISM约旦标准可能额外引用IEC 61000抗扰度要求（独立于TRC）；出口商在发货前应就其具体产品类别向JISM确认适用的JS标准。
gap.zht: TRC要求提供符合ETSI EN 301 489系列標準的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在TRC認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能用於TRC。ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列），該部分不在SRRC範圍之內。JISM約旦標準可能額外引用IEC 61000抗擾度要求（獨立於TRC）；出口商在發貨前應就其具體產品類別向JISM確認適用的JS標準。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to ETSI EN 301 489 series at a TRC-accepted accredited laboratory is required as part of TRC type approval for Jordan. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not accepted by TRC. Verify applicable JISM Jordan Standards (JS) for your specific product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在TRC认可的经认可实验室按ETSI EN 301 489系列进行EMC测试，是约旦TRC型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被TRC接受。请就您的具体产品类别核验适用的JISM约旦标准（JS）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在TRC認可的經認可實驗室按ETSI EN 301 489系列進行EMC測試，是約旦TRC型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被TRC接受。請就您的具體產品類別核驗適用的JISM約旦標準（JS）。

requirement_topic.en: JISM Jordan Standards (JS) Conformity — Regulated Electrical and Electronic Product Categories
requirement_topic.zh: JISM约旦标准（JS）合规 — 受监管电气和电子产品类别
requirement_topic.zht: JISM約旦標準（JS）合規 — 受監管電氣和電子產品類別

summary.en: JISM (Jordan Institution for Standards and Metrology — مؤسسة المواصفات والمقاييس) publishes Jordan Standards (JS) that adopt or adapt IEC, ISO, ETSI, and other international standards. Regulated electrical and electronic consumer products may require JISM conformity assessment and certification against applicable JS standards before sale in Jordan. Wireless IoT devices and consumer electronics with mains-connected power supplies may fall within JISM's regulated product scope in addition to TRC type approval. JISM conformity obligations are separate from and additive to TRC type approval; both may be required simultaneously for mains-powered wireless consumer products. Exporters should confirm the current JISM regulated product schedule and applicable JS standards for their device category prior to shipment.
summary.zh: JISM（约旦标准与计量机构）发布约旦标准（JS），采用或改编IEC、ISO、ETSI及其他国际标准。受监管的电气和电子消费品在约旦销售前，可能须依据适用的JS标准进行JISM合规评估与认证。无线物联网设备及带市电电源的消费电子产品，除TRC型号认证外还可能纳入JISM受监管产品范围。JISM合规义务与TRC型号认证相互独立且可叠加；对于市电供电的无线消费产品，两者可能同时要求。出口商在发货前应确认当前JISM受监管产品目录及其设备类别适用的JS标准。
summary.zht: JISM（約旦標準與計量機構）發布約旦標準（JS），採用或改編IEC、ISO、ETSI及其他國際標準。受監管的電氣和電子消費品在約旦銷售前，可能須依據適用的JS標準進行JISM合規評估與認證。無線物聯網設備及帶市電電源的消費電子產品，除TRC型號認證外還可能納入JISM受監管產品範圍。JISM合規義務與TRC型號認證相互獨立且可疊加；對於市電供電的無線消費產品，兩者可能同時要求。出口商在發貨前應確認當前JISM受監管產品目錄及其設備類別適用的JS標準。

standards_or_laws: Jordan Standards (JS) series — JISM (adoptions of IEC/ETSI/ISO)
Jordan Consumer Protection Law (Ministry of Industry and Trade)
IEC 61000 series (adopted as JS equivalents for EMC immunity)

summary.en: In China, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is the mandatory product safety and EMC scheme for products listed in the CCC compulsory catalogue, administered by CNCA. GB 4943.1 covers IT and AV equipment safety; GB/T 9254 covers EMC emissions. CCC mark must appear on in-scope products before sale in China.
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC（中国强制认证）是针对CCC强制目录内产品的强制性产品安全与EMC方案，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。GB 4943.1涵盖IT及音视频设备安全；GB/T 9254涵盖EMC发射。列入目录的产品须在中国销售前标注CCC标志。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC（中國強制認證）是針對CCC強制目錄內產品的強制性產品安全與EMC方案，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。GB 4943.1涵蓋IT及音視頻設備安全；GB/T 9254涵蓋EMC發射。列入目錄的產品須在中國銷售前標注CCC標誌。

gap.en: CCC certification is not recognised in Jordan by JISM or TRC. Where a wireless device falls within the JISM regulated product scope, a separate conformity assessment against applicable JS standards is required. JS standards are typically IEC/ETSI adoptions, so test data generated to IEC or ETSI standards may be usable but must be submitted to and assessed by JISM through its proper conformity assessment channels. Importers should verify whether their specific product category is listed under the current JISM regulated product schedule before shipment.
gap.zh: CCC认证不被JISM或TRC承认。若无线设备属于JISM受监管产品范围，须依据适用的JS标准另行进行合规评估。JS标准通常为IEC/ETSI采用版，因此依据IEC或ETSI标准生成的测试数据可能可用，但须通过JISM正式合规评估渠道提交和评估。进口商在发货前应核验其具体产品类别是否列于当前JISM受监管产品目录。
gap.zht: CCC認證不被JISM或TRC承認。若無線設備屬於JISM受監管產品範圍，須依據適用的JS標準另行進行合規評估。JS標準通常為IEC/ETSI採用版，因此依據IEC或ETSI標準生成的測試資料可能可用，但須通過JISM正式合規評估渠道提交和評估。進口商在發貨前應核驗其具體產品類別是否列於當前JISM受監管產品目錄。

source.publisher: JISM — Jordan Institution for Standards and Metrology (مؤسسة المواصفات والمقاييس)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] JISM conformity assessment against applicable Jordan Standards (JS) may be mandatory for regulated electrical and electronic product categories sold in Jordan, in addition to TRC type approval. CCC certification is not accepted. Verify the current JISM regulated product schedule and applicable JS standards for your specific device category before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在约旦销售的受监管电气和电子产品类别，除TRC型号认证外还可能须依据适用约旦标准（JS）进行JISM合规评估。CCC认证不被接受。出口前请核验您具体设备类别的当前JISM受监管产品目录及适用JS标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在約旦銷售的受監管電氣和電子產品類別，除TRC型號認證外還可能須依據適用約旦標準（JS）進行JISM合規評估。CCC認證不被接受。出口前請核驗您具體設備類別的當前JISM受監管產品目錄及適用JS標準。
